user.title: KazeMBridge — MHI WF-RAC
user.description: Enter the local IP address of your MHI WF-RAC Wi-Fi adapter.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the IP address and that the adapter is on your local network.
error.operator_list_full: The AC operator list is full (max ~4 accounts). Remove an account via the SmartM-Air app and try again.
error.register_failed: Failed to register with the AC.
